steps.title: Spot the defining contrast
steps.content: The passage establishes one method for cartographers (starting from the lowest point), then pivots to hydrologists' opposite method (starting from the top). This reversal is the defining feature.

steps.title: Match the contrast signal
steps.content: ”By contrast” marks the opposition. The other three don't: they either claim similarity, present examples, or restate the opening. That matches choice B — B is correct.
